Private Boat Rental in Benalmádena, Marbella & Estepona

Your group, your captain, and the Mediterranean at your disposal. Design a custom trip by choosing the duration and route you prefer.

  1. Home
  2. Private Charter with Captain

Your Boat, Your Rules: Exclusive Charters

From 2 hours Costa del Sol 5.0 VIP Experience

Rent our boat exclusively with a captain and design an unforgettable day tailored just for you.

Check Availability

Total Freedom at Sea

Looking for a romantic getaway, a family fishing trip, or simply anchoring in front of the best beaches in Marbella or Estepona? Our Private Charter with Captain is Rumbomed's most flexible option.

Forget about fixed itineraries. You decide how many hours you want to sail and what you want to do on board. Our captain will take care of bringing you to the most spectacular corners of the Costa del Sol while you and your party relax in total privacy.

Perfect for proposals, birthdays, or just enjoying the Mediterranean lifestyle with your inner circle.

Charter Highlights

  • 100% Private Sailing Experience
  • Professional Captain included
  • Customizable Route & Itinerary
  • Snorkel and Paddle Surf equipment
  • Complimentary drinks on board
  • Bluetooth for your own music

Suggestions for Your Custom Route

Although you design the plan, here are some of our favorite sailing routes:

Luxury Route (Marbella - Puerto Banús)

Sail past Marbella's Golden Mile, admiring the most impressive mansions from the sea and enjoying the exclusive atmosphere of Puerto Banús.

Nature Route (Watching & Relax)

We head out in search of dolphins in the open sea and finish by anchoring in quiet coves to practice Paddle Surf and enjoy a swim in crystal clear waters.

Magical Sunset Route

You choose the departure time to end the day with a cava toast as the sun sets behind the Rock of Gibraltar and the Moroccan coast.

Rates and Booking

Private Hourly Rental

As this is a personalized service, the price varies according to duration and departure port (Marbella, Estepona, or Malaga).

From €150 / hour

Maximum capacity: Up to 12 people per boat for total comfort.

Request a Quote
